description: Tiny public human-speech smoke corpus for the STT spike. These are benchmark fixtures, not product assets.

samples.description: Short English human speech fixture from the Hugging Face Narsil/asr_dummy dataset.
samples.license: Dataset repository does not declare a license in Hub metadata; use for local spike smoke testing only.
